subject: Add SEO structured data and performance optimization
description: Phase 5: Set up @astrojs/sitemap with per-category sitemaps. Add JSON-LD structured data to all product pages. Add Open Graph meta tags. Set up Pagefind build-time search index. Configure Astro image optimization (WebP/AVIF). Add lazy loading and preconnect hints. Ensure zero JS by default with only interactive islands loading scripts.
